description: The VRIKAvatar component is used to drive and control the VRIK component on an Avatar.

fields.HeightCompensation: How much to scale up or down the user's avatar compared to the tracking points. Think a multiplier to avatar scale vs user root.
fields.AvatarHeight: The height of the avatar from floor to eyes in meters.
fields.UserResizeThreshold: How much the user has to be different from original scale in percentage before prompting to reset scale.
fields.FeetIgnoreOtherPlayers: Whether feet raycasts ignore other users.
fields.FeetCollisionListMode: The mode to use for feet raycasting whitelist/blacklist.
fields.FeetCollisionList: The list of items to filter to/from raycasting according to ``FeetCollisionListMode``
fields.HeadMaxFixDistance: The maximum distance to allow fixing head position due to bad IK.
fields.ForceUseFeetProxies: Whether to force the use of Feet proxy/tracker objects.
fields.ForceUsePelvisProxy: Whether to force the use of Pelvis proxy/tracker objects.
fields.ForceUseChestProxy: Whether to force the use of Chest proxy/tracker objects.
fields.ForceUseElbowProxies: Whether to force the use of Elbow proxy/tracker objects.
fields.ForceUseKneeProxies: Whether to force the use of Knee proxy/tracker objects.
fields.FeetCalibrated: Whether or not the feet are calibrated.
fields.PelvisCalibrated: Whether or not the pelvis is calibrated.
fields.GroundCheckHeightRatio: How far to check compared to user height for the floor (unused)
fields.FeetHoverHeight: The height at which feet should hover in either up or down from rest position when off the floor.
fields.FeetHoverSmoothSpeed: How much to smooth the feet movement when hovering.
fields.MinFeetTransitionSpeed: The minimum speed at random to transition to different modes.
fields.MaxFeetTransitionSpeed: The maximum speed at random to transition to different modes.
fields.GaitFeetTransitionSpeedMultiplier: How much to multiply the user's speed to determine the gait speed.
fields.FeetHoverTilt: How much to tilt the feet when hovering.
fields.LeftFootFloatOffset: How much to offset the left foot when starting hovering.
fields.RightFootFloatOffset: How much to offset the right foot when starting hovering.
fields.LeftFootRootHeight: How much to move up the left foot when starting hovering.
fields.RightFootRootHeight: How much to move up the right foot when starting hovering.
fields.FootFloatSpeed: How fast the feet should move when hovering.
fields.FootFloatAngleMagnitude: How much the feet angle should change when hovering.
fields.FootFloatOffsetMagnitude: How much the feet should wander from avatar center when hovering.
fields.FeetFloatVelocityForce: How much velocity to apply to the feet hovering simulation when moving.
fields.FeetFloatVelocityDampeningSpeed: How much to dampen velocity over time for the feet hovering simulation.
fields.MaxFeetVelocityOffset: The maximum amount that the feet can wander from avatar center.
fields.VelocityAverageRate: The average amount of velocity the user has while moving in user transform space.
fields.HoverVelocityThreshold: The threshold for velocity the user needs to be to be hovering.
fields.HorizontalBodyAngle: The angle required for the user to be considered horizontal for their hips.
fields.SupressWalkAnimationWhenHorizontal: Whether or not to suppress the walking animation when the user is horizontal.
fields.AlwaysUseTrackersWhenHorizontal: Whether or not to always override and use trackers when the user is horizontal.
fields.Gaits: A list of gaits to use when moving (Now is unused).
fields.GaitTransitionSpeed: How fast to transition between different gaits (Now is unused).
fields.GaitMovementDirectionSmoothSpeed: How much to smooth the gait feet movement direction (Now is unused).
fields.RigCollidersRadiusRatio: The ratio between the avatar limb length and collider radius sizes.
fields.LeftHandRotationOffset: The offset for the left hand rotation versus controller rotation.
fields.RightHandRotationOffset: The offset for the right hand rotation versus controller rotation.
fields.CurrentAverageVelocity: The average amount of velocity the user has while moving in user transform space.
fields.CurrentOnGround: Whether or not the user is currently is on the ground.
fields.CurrentGaitIndex: The current walk animation the user is using (Now is unused).
fields._locomotionController: The current locomotion module the user is using.
fields._leftHandNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the left hand.
fields._rightHandNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the right hand.
fields._leftElbowNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the left elbow.
fields._rightElbowNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the right elbow.
fields._leftFootNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the left foot.
fields._rightFootNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the right foot.
fields._leftKneeNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the left knee.
fields._rightKneeNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the right knee.
fields._headNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the head.
fields._pelvisNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the pelvis.
fields._chestNode: The avatar pose node for posing/IK for the chest.
fields._headProxy: The proxy slot for the head.
fields._pelvisProxy: The proxy slot for the pelvis.
fields._chestProxy: The proxy slot for the chest.
fields._leftHandProxy: The proxy slot for the left hand.
fields._rightHandProxy: The proxy slot for the right hand.
fields._leftElbowProxy: The proxy slot for the left elbow.
fields._rightElbowProxy: The proxy slot for the right elbow.
fields._leftFootProxy: The proxy slot for the left foot.
fields._rightFootProxy: The proxy slot for the right foot.
fields._leftKneeProxy: The proxy slot for the left knee.
fields._rightKneeProxy: The proxy slot for the right knee.
fields._leftKneeDefaultProxy: The default proxy slot for the left knee.
fields._rightKneeDefaultProxy: The default proxy slot for the right knee.
fields._headTargetPos: The field to drive for the head position.
fields._headTargetRot: The field to drive for the head rotation.
fields._pelvisTargetPos: The field to drive for the pelvis position.
fields._pelvisTargetRot: The field to drive for the pelvis rotation.
fields._chestTargetPos: The field to drive for the chest position.
fields._leftHandTargetPos: The field to drive for the left hand position.
fields._leftHandTargetRot: The field to drive for the left hand rotation.
fields._rightHandTargetPos: The field to drive for the right hand position.
fields._rightHandTargetRot: The field to drive for the right hand rotation.
fields._leftElbowTargetPos: The field to drive for the left elbow position.
fields._rightElbowTargetPos: The field to drive for the left elbow position.
fields._leftFootTargetPos: The field to drive for the left foot position.
fields._leftFootTargetRot: The field to drive for the left foot rotation.
fields._rightFootTargetPos: The field to drive for the right foot position.
fields._rightFootTargetRot: The field to drive for the right foot position.
fields._leftKneeTargetPos: The field to drive for the left knee position.
fields._rightKneeTargetPos: The field to drive for the right knee position.
fields._pelvisPositionWeight: The field to drive for the pelvis position weight.
fields._pelvisRotationWeight: The field to drive for the pelvis rotation weight.
fields._chestWeight: The field to drive for the chest weight.
fields._locomotionWeight: The field to drive for the locomotion weight.
fields._leftLegPositionWeight: The field to drive for the left leg position weight.
fields._leftLegRotationWeight: The field to drive for the left leg rotation weight.
fields._rightLegPositionWeight: The field to drive for the right leg position weight.
fields._rightLegRotationWeight: The field to drive for the right leg rotation weight.
fields._leftKneeBendWeight: The field to drive for the left knee bend weight.
fields._rightKneeBendWeight: The field to drive for the right knee bend weight.
fields._leftElbowBendWeight: The field to drive for the left elbow bend weight.
fields._rightElbowBendWeight: The field to drive for the right elbow bend weight.
fields._leftFootOffset: The field to drive for the left foot bend weight.
fields._rightFootOffset: The field to drive for the right foot bend weight.
fields._leftFootRelativeToRoot: The rotation of the left foot relative to the character root.
fields._rightFootRelativeToRoot: The rotation of the right foot to the character root.
fields._locomotionOffset: The field to drive with the locomotion offset.
fields._simplifiedColliderEnabled: The field to drive with the simplified collider hit box.
fields._rigCollidersEnabledStates: The field list to drive with all the complex rig collider enabled states.
fields._horizontalTrackingLocked: Whether or not the horizontal rig tracking is locked.

methods.FilterAvatarHeadPose(): Used in a transform override component on the user's head to prevent the view from rotating when it's being simulated by the locomotion system

notes.title: Gait
notes.text: This part of the system is no longer used, so documentation may be inaccurate, but there is no longer a way to test this system anymore.
